title: Executive Order 7606—Designating the Chairman of the United States Maritime Commission
text:
By virtue of and pursuant to the authority vested in me by section 201(a) of the Merchant Marine Act, 1936 (49 Stat. 1985), I hereby designate Joseph P. Kennedy as Chairman of the United States Maritime Commission.
FRANKLIN D ROOSEVELT
The White House,
April 16, 1937.
